title: Warden Walkers
description: Defeat the Warden. Use its horns to create the Warden Walkers. Forge & Fabric
body:
# A Pair of Boots Worth Considering.
**Defeat the Warden. Use its horns to create the Warden Walkers.**

![Warden Walkers on Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fz0e9uav/images/79a8a1391a0acaa74c5e5614d53dfa963e9371d8.png)

## What the Warden Walkers Do:
- Silence Several Vibrations from Warden & Sculk Detection
- Provide an impressive degree of protection
- The silenced vibrations include stepping, hitting the ground, equipping armor, and throwing or firing a projectile (The projectile landing will still be detected)

## How to obtain the Warden Walkers:
To obtain the Warden Walkers, a player would first need to defeat the Warden in combat. After defeating the Warden, a new item will drop called the Warden Horn. **The Warden Horn can be combined with Diamond Boots** in the Smithing Table to create the Warden Walkers.

### FAQ
Q: How do I repair my Warden Walkers?
A: Warden Walkers can be repaired using Echo Shards, which are found as chest loot in Ancient Cities.
